overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player walking through a narrow industrial alley with glowing server racks, passing two female characters (one manifesting a purple holographic effect), then emerging into a sunlit cyberpunk street with neon signs and massive industrial architecture overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with server racks

events.description: second character manifests purple holographic glow effect around her body

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the narrow alley approaching two women standing near the wall

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing with hand on hip against the wall
figure with purple holographic aura standing near the alley wall

entered.detail: tall industrial server racks with glowing orange indicator lights and metal grating
bright sunlight streaming down from narrow gap between tall buildings above
scattered cardboard, trash, and discarded items on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow cyberpunk alley flanked by a glowing server rack wall on the left. Two women stand ahead near the wall, with one suddenly manifesting a purple holographic effect around 4 seconds. The space is enclosed and shadowed with light filtering from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley exit with industrial trash bins

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into the wider sunlit cyberpunk street

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the two women and moving toward the bright alley exit

entered.detail: large industrial green trash bins against the right wall overflowing with debris
opening at the end of the alley leading to the bright exterior street

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the two women and approaches the alley exit, passing large green dumpsters on the right. The lighting transitions from shadowed to bright sunlight as the street opening approaches, with distant pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with neon signage

events.description: camera turns slightly right to focus on the cyan vacancy neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy street observing the cyberpunk architecture and neon signs

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing with blue bag walking past the camera

entered.detail: bright cyan neon sign reading VACANCY mounted on yellow industrial building
massive network of metal pipes, walkways, and industrial infrastructure spanning overhead
weathered yellow industrial building with external metal staircase

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open cyberpunk street, the player walks past pedestrians while massive industrial structures loom overhead. A prominent cyan VACANCY neon sign marks a yellow building on the right as the camera briefly turns to focus on it.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level industrial street with steam vents and upper walkways

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the upper level walkways and industrial architecture

agents.ego_description: slowing to look up at the intricate upper level architecture and industrial details

notable_agents.action: person standing on upper level balcony near the purple awning

entered.detail: industrial vent emitting steam or smoke into the street
elevated metal platform with railings connecting building upper levels
purple fabric awning over an entrance on the upper building level

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the street while looking upward at the dense industrial architecture. Steam rises from vents near a metal upper walkway, and the VACANCY sign grows larger as the camera tilts up to examine the multi-level cyberpunk structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed, enclosed industrial alley into a bright, expansive cyberpunk street. It begins by moving past a glowing wall of server racks where two women stand, one of whom suddenly manifests a purple holographic effect. As the camera passes the women and moves beside large green dumpsters, the dim lighting transitions into brilliant sunlight at the alley's exit. The scene then opens into a bustling street filled with pedestrians and massive overhead industrial structures, briefly turning toward a prominent cyan VACANCY neon sign on a yellow building. Finally, the camera tilts upward to examine the dense, multi-level architecture and rising steam vents as the VACANCY sign looms larger against the urban skyline.
